summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Miss SC CY26 Crew Logistics App. All 7 tabs functional, responsive nav working on desktop and mobile, realtime status sync confirmed working with Supabase, status persistence verified across page reloads.
passed_tests: App loads successfully at preview URL (https://miss-sc-logistics.preview.emergentagent.com)
All 7 tabs present and navigable (Today, Schedule, Deliverables, Interviews, Delegates, Titleholders, Contacts + Map)
Default tab is Today with 'Sunday, June 14 — BIG SHOOT DAY' label
Desktop horizontal tab bar displays all tabs correctly
Today tab shows day strip with correct date selection and timeline rows
Schedule tab has 'Our shoots' and 'Master schedule' toggles working
Deliverables tab alert banner present with correct Sunday 6/14 warning text
Deliverables tab shows 'Live · synced with crew' status indicator
Deliverables tab has Filming day / Due day mode toggle
Deliverables tab has All / Video / Social type filters
Deliverables tab shows day chips with counts (Sun 12, Mon 6, Tue 7, etc.)
Deliverables tab search box filters deliverables correctly
Deliverables tab shows three groups: Production Videos (13), Social — Must-Have, Social — Nice-to-Have
Deliverables tab has 4-state status controls (Not started, Filming, Editing, Delivered)
Deliverables tab 'Updating as' initials input field working
HEADLINE FEATURE: Realtime status sync working - changes in one browser appear in another within 2 seconds (verified with 'updated just now · TEST2' timestamp)
Status persistence working - statuses survive page reload
Data integrity: 'fire-dress' deliverable exists titled 'Opening Number Fire Dress Video' due 'Tue 6/16, 11:00 AM'
Interviews tab banner 'We film both rooms — one camera each' present
Interviews tab has All/Miss/Teen filter chips with counts
Interviews tab shows 5 run-of-show tables (Mon Miss Mu, Mon Miss Alpha, Tue Miss Sigma, Mon Teen Silver, Mon Teen Gold)
Interviews tab has NO 'Quality of Life'/QOL block (verified count = 0)
Delegates tab has Miss/Teen toggle with correct counts (Miss 40, Teen 27)
Delegates tab shows WITHDREW entries (struck-through/dimmed)
Titleholders tab shows all 3 cards (Sarah Kay Wrenn, LilyKate Barbare, Tess Ferm)
Titleholders tab images render correctly (base64 data URIs)
Titleholders tab has 'Official page' external links for each titleholder
Contacts + Map tab shows Morgan contact with tap-to-call tel: links
Contacts + Map tab has Google Maps links for locations
Contacts + Map tab has NO 'Location TBD' placeholder (verified count = 0)
Footer text 'Built by Take Part Co · Times subject to change, do not print · Confirm TBDs with Morgan' present
Mobile viewport (390x844) shows slim bar with current tab name on left
Mobile viewport shows hamburger menu button on RIGHT
Mobile menu opens with X close button
Mobile menu lists all 7 tabs with current tab highlighted
Mobile menu closes on tab selection and backdrop tap
Mobile menu has Share link and 'Add to Home Screen' instructions at BOTTOM
Share functionality has Copy button and iPhone/Android toggle
No JavaScript console errors or red error screens on any tab
